retry_reason: Failure indicates a transient or permanent error (e.g., ENOMEM, EPERM) that may or may not be retryable; the function is not a wrapper, so retry semantics are not part of its core contract.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of btmtk_submit_intr_urb is to submit an interrupt URB for Bluetooth I/O, not to manage reference counts. Although it internally performs a get (usb_anchor_urb) and a put (usb_free_urb) on the URB, these are standard USB URB lifecycle steps within a larger I/O submission routine. The function does not pass a reference-counted object to the caller; instead, it returns an error code.
judge.retry_reason: Failure indicates a transient or permanent error (e.g., ENOMEM, EPERM) that may or may not be retryable; the function is not a wrapper, so retry semantics are not part of its core contract.
